untranslatable_reason: Signal references undefined 'sell zone', 'buy zone', 'support area', 'resistance level', and 'moving average type/period' marked as AUTHOR_SILENT. Used pivot points (s1/r1) as reasonable proxies for support/resistance, and sma_20 as a standard moving average, but these are interpretative substitutions without explicit source specification.
translation_notes: Converted vague support/resistance zones to pivot point levels (s1=support, r1=resistance) as best available substitutes. Used sma_20 as a standard moving average in absence of author-specified period. Entry conditions use OR logic (any one trigger creates signal). Exit conditions use OR logic (any one trigger closes position). Zone thresholds (sell/buy zones) could not be precisely defined and are represented by the pivot support/resistance crossovers.
